{{#cargo_store:_table=Shells
|name={{PAGENAME}}
|image={{PAGENAME}}.png
|description=
|affct=
|hard=
|source=
|color=green

|earth=1
|water=1
|fire=1
|wind=1

|form=
|element=
|realm=
|orangehard=
}}

<infobox>
  <title source="name"/>
  <image source="image"/>
  <data source="affct">
    <label>AFFCT</label>
  </data>
</infobox>

==Source==
Default

==Stats==
{| class="wikitable"
!Stars
!Earth RES
!Water RES
!Fire RES
!Wind RES
!Special Stats
|-
|style="background-color:var(--green-bg)" |★☆☆
|1
|1
|1
|1
|}

==Description==
The innately normal Snail Shell inherited the ancestry's unremarkable trait. But as an original, its quality is guaranteed!

[[Category:Shells]]
